title: Photography services for people, businesses and meaningful moments
intro: Warm, natural, story-led photography for meaningful people, places and moments. Every session is planned with care and documented with intention — from the big occasion to the real moments in between.
seoTitle: Photography Services in Lichtenburg | Shaney Hansen
seoDescription: Explore wedding, family, maternity, newborn, school, corporate, studio and destination photography by Shaney Hansen in Lichtenburg and beyond.
heroWhatsappText: Hello Shaney, I'd like to enquire about photography.

services.name: Wedding Photography
services.whoFor: For couples planning their wedding day, locally or as a destination celebration.
services.expect: A calm, professional presence and warm, story-led documentation of your full day — the moments you felt and the details you never want to forget.
services.linkLabel: Wedding photography, areas served & how booking works
services.imageAlt: Bride and groom in soft natural light on their wedding day

services.name: Corporate Photography
services.whoFor: For business portraits, team photos, conferences, branding and professional content.
services.expect: Professional images for websites, LinkedIn, social media and brand content — polished and consistent, but still natural and human.
services.imageAlt: Professional corporate headshot in natural light

services.name: School Photography
services.whoFor: For schools and pre-schools needing portraits, class photos, photo booths and sport headshots.
services.expect: A calm, organised, child-friendly approach that keeps the day running smoothly, planned directly with the school or organisation.
services.linkLabel: School & pre-school services, schools worked with & areas

services.name: Couples Photography
services.whoFor: For engagements, anniversaries, romantic shoots and relationship sessions.
services.expect: Relaxed direction and natural, connected portraits that feel like the two of you.
services.imageAlt: Couple photography session in soft natural light

services.name: Family Photography
services.whoFor: For families who want natural, unforced photographs of real connection.
services.expect: A gentle, unhurried session focused on laughter, togetherness and the in-between moments.
services.imageAlt: Family photography session in soft natural light

services.name: Maternity Photography
services.expect: Soft, feminine, light-filled photography that honours this season with warmth and care.
services.imageAlt: Maternity photography session in South Africa

services.name: Newborn Photography
services.whoFor: For gentle newborn sessions in those first precious weeks.
services.expect: A calm, patient, baby-led session — no rushing, no pressure, just softness and care.
services.imageAlt: Newborn photography session by Shaney Hansen

services.name: Cake Smash Photography
services.whoFor: For first birthdays and milestone celebrations.
services.expect: A joyful, styled session with a setup planned around your little one — colourful, playful and full of personality.

services.name: Studio Sessions
services.whoFor: For controlled indoor shoots — portraits, creative concepts and beautifully lit scenes.
services.expect: A considered studio experience with thoughtful lighting and creative direction.
services.imageAlt: Studio photography session by Shaney Hansen

services.name: Styled Sessions
services.whoFor: For themed, creative, seasonal or concept shoots — personal, family or brand.
services.expect: Creative shoots for campaigns, seasonal content, personal brands or social media storytelling, with creative direction and styling shaped around your concept.
services.imageAlt: Styled photography session with creative direction

services.name: Sport Headshots & School Sport
services.whoFor: For sports days, teams, action photos and school sport events.
services.expect: Energetic, action-led coverage and clean sport headshots that capture effort, teamwork and the big moments.

services.name: Destination Lifestyle & Content Photography
services.whoFor: For destination weddings, creators, brands, teams and families who want the full experience documented for both memories and online storytelling.
services.expect: Shaney travels with you and documents the full journey — the quiet in-between moments, the details, the portraits, the lifestyle content and the main occasion.
services.packageDetails: Travel fees, accommodation, duration, deliverables and quote confirmed individually.

pricingText: No two stories are the same — a sunrise maternity session, a full wedding day and a styled cake smash each ask for different planning, travel, styling and editing time. Rather than fitting your moment into a standard package, Shaney prepares a quote around exactly what you need, so you only ever pay for what your session truly involves. Share a few details about what you're dreaming of, and you'll receive a personal quote — usually within a day or two.
pricingNote: Travel beyond 30 kilometres is quoted separately. From time to time, Shaney also runs seasonal mini sessions and special offers — announced on Facebook and Instagram first, so follow along so you don't miss them.
ctaSectionText: Share what you have in mind and Shaney will help shape it into a session that feels like you.
